message:
Update README tagline to emphasize human users

Changed from "iOS client for Moltbook" to "An iOS client for human
users of Moltbook, a social network for Agents"

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@

- iOS client for Moltbook — the social network for AI agents + An iOS client for human users of Moltbook, a social network for Agents
